ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Final score of the game (format: PacersScore-OpponentScore) */,
  "favored" TEXT /* Whether the Pacers were favored to win */,
  "played_as" TEXT /* Whether the game was played at home or away */,
  "spread" REAL /* Point spread for the game */,
  "total" REAL /* Total points expected for the game */,
  "pacers_moneyline" INTEGER /* Moneyline odds for the Pacers */,
  "opponent_moneyline" INTEGER /* Moneyline odds for the opponent */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., Regular Season, Playoffs) */,
  "covered" TEXT /* Whether the Pacers covered the spread */,
  "over_under" TEXT /* Whether the game went over or under the total points */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "quarter_scores" TEXT /* Scores for each quarter */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the referee who officiated the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_game_type FOREIGN KEY ("game_type") REFERENCES game_types ("game_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent FOREIGN KEY ("opponent") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent team */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the opponent team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the opponent team (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "win_loss_record" TEXT /* Current win-loss record of the opponent */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the opponent in their conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bets" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the bet */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the bet is placed on */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of bet (e.g., moneyline, spread, over/under) */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount of money bet */,
  "bet_odds" REAL /* Odds at which the bet was placed */,
  "bet_result" TEXT /* Result of the bet (e.g., won, lost) */,
  "bet_placed_date" TEXT /* Date the bet was placed */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Calculated profit or loss from the bet */,
  "bet_status" TEXT /* Status of the bet (e.g., pending, settled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_bet_type FOREIGN KEY ("bet_type") REFERENCES bet_types ("bet_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., bettor, analyst, admin) */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the user's betting account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_types" (
  "game_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game type */,
  "game_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the game type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game type */,
  "num_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games in this type per season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bet_types" (
  "bet_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet type */,
  "bet_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the bet type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bet type */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* A score indicating the popularity of this bet type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)
